title: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Moves 3.6% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
text: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Here's Why Hold is an Apt Strategy for Willis Towers (WTW)
text: Segmental strength, solid capital position and favorable growth estimates make Willis Towers (WTW) stock worth retaining in one's portfolio.
